_meta.purpose: Natural cross-domain queries — how a real user would actually phrase them, not systematic pair enumeration. Tests ASV's multi-intent decomposition on realistic enterprise requests that happen to span multiple SaaS tools.

queries.query: refund them and cancel their order
customer just complained, refund the charge and log a bug
text the customer their order shipped
new client coming in — add to stripe, make them a notion page
bill the client and send them an sms about it
file a linear ticket and call the on-call engineer
cancel their subscription, notify them by text
the billing bug is fixed, close the ticket and refund the customer
onboard new enterprise: stripe account, subscription, welcome sms
document this in notion and open a linear tracking issue
charge their card now and send the receipt
sold out of the blue shirt — update inventory and text the waitlist
assign sarah to this bug and ping her on sms
look up that topic in notion and file a bug for it
new sneaker launch: list the product, make a discount code
customer wants out - cancel the stripe subscription and update their shopify record
holiday sale kickoff: create discount, announce by sms, document in notion
the customer double-paid - refund them and file a billing bug in linear
new support runbook in notion, linear ticket for the broken flow
call the customer about the deployment issue and log in linear
ship the order and confirm shipment via sms
create a new notion page for this customer and add them to stripe
cancel the order, text the customer, refund their card
team kickoff - linear project, notion doc, sms the team
disputed charge came in - open a dispute case and file a linear ticket
new feature launching tuesday - linear project, notion spec, shopify product
list today's orders and send me a text summary
update the stripe customer and log the change in notion
void the payment and close the linear bug
customer requested invoice - send the invoice and log it in notion
product launch day! ship the preorders and text every buyer
missed payment - text the customer and log in linear
adjust stock levels and notify supplier via phone
archive the old notion page and close the corresponding ticket
cancel their subscription, delete them from shopify, log the churn in notion
list recent calls and create a summary page in notion
create a linear ticket, assign emma, notify her via sms
start the verify flow and send them the otp
notion search for the api spec and file an enhancement ticket
retry the charge and call them if it fails again
